item_text: 1° accesso: no -> no first access; si -> yes first access
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-access-001 title: user access - first access - registration process module: access source pages: 1 preconditions: user has not accessed the app before. test data: valid user details for registration. test steps: 1. user accesses the app. 2. system checks if it's the first access. 3. system prompts for registration. 4. user enters valid registration details. 5. system processes the registration. 6. system redirects to the home page. expected result: user is successfully registered and redirected to the home page.

item_text: utente gia' registrato?: no -> not registered; si -> registered
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-004 title: login process - first access - registration success module: access source pages: 1 preconditions: user attempts to register and succeeds. test data: valid registration details. test steps: 1. user accesses the app. 2. system checks if it's the first access. 3. system prompts for registration. 4. user enters valid registration details. 5. system processes the registration. 6. system redirects to the home page. expected result: user is successfully registered and redirected to the home page.

item_text: tragitto in corso?: si -> avvia tragitto; no -> vuoi cambiare sezione?

item_text: vuoi cambiare sezione?: si -> menu orrizzontale; no -> home
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-statistics-001 title: statistics - view weekly report module: statistics source pages: 3 preconditions: user is on the statistics menu. test data: valid weekly report request. test steps: 1. user is on the statistics menu. 2. system prompts to view a weekly report. 3. user requests to view the weekly report. 4. system generates the weekly report. 5. system returns to the statistics menu. expected result: weekly report is generated and the user is returned to the statistics menu.

item_text: vuoi aggiornare l'account?: si -> inseerisci nuovi dati; no -> visualizza dati personali
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profile-001 title: profile management - update account data module: profile source pages: 4 preconditions: user is on the profile management menu. test data: valid new account data. test steps: 1. user is on the profile management menu. 2. system prompts to update account data. 3. user confirms to update account data. 4. user enters valid new data. 5. system updates the account data. 6. system returns to the profile management menu. expected result: account data is updated and the user is returned to the profile management menu.

item_text: vuoi uscire dall'account?: si -> logout; no -> visualizza dati personali
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profile-002 title: profile management - logout module: profile source pages: 4 preconditions: user is on the profile management menu. test data: valid logout request. test steps: 1. user is on the profile management menu. 2. system prompts to update account data. 3. user declines to update account data. 4. user requests to logout. 5. system logs the user out. 6. system returns to the home page. expected result: user is logged out and redirected to the home page.
